title: Mitophagy induction using Oligomycin/Antimycin A
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"631g","text":"Mitophagy induction in HeLa cells using Oligomycin/Antimycin A.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Seed cells, aiming for a confluency of 80-90% at the time of treatment the next day.
Feed cells for 01:00:00 in an appropriate volume of standard growth media.
To start the treatment, replace the media in each well with standard growth media that contains 10 micromolar (µM) Oligomycin, 4 micromolar (µM) Antimycin A, and 10 micromolar (µM) QVD.
Harvest the samples after the desired treatment times.
creator: Louise Uoselis
